meaning: vt.遗失,浪费,错过,输去,使失去,使迷路,使沉溺于vi.受损失,失败
examples: As we age we lose muscle tissue.
If they overestimate, they lose revenue.
Merck and Bristol-Myers Squibb lose patent protection on Zocor and Pravachol next year, removing any incentive.
All sorts of people lose their temper in their daily lives, it's part of human nature.
